name: Prowlarr
compose:
name: slashnode-prowlarr
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/prowlarr:version-2.4.0.5397
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9696:9696
  indexer_proxy:
    image: flaresolverr/flaresolverr:v3.4.6
    container_name: indexer_proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
  mac:
    image: getumbrel/media-app-configurator:v1.3.0
    container_name: mac
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      APP_ID: prowlarr
      APP_URL: http://prowlarr_server_1:9696
      FLARESOLVERR_URL: http://prowlarr_indexer_proxy_1:8191
      TRANSMISSION_HOST: transmission_server_1
      TRANSMISSION_PORT: '9091'
      RADARR_URL: http://radarr_server_1:7878
      RADARR_CONFIG_XML: ${APP_PROWLARR_RADARR_CONFIG_XML}
      LIDARR_URL: http://lidarr_server_1:8686
      LIDARR_CONFIG_XML: ${APP_PROWLARR_LIDARR_CONFIG_XML}
      SONARR_URL: http://sonarr_server_1:8989
      SONARR_CONFIG_XML: ${APP_PROWLARR_SONARR_CONFIG_XML}
      READARR_URL: http://readarr_server_1:8787
      READARR_CONFIG_XML: ${APP_PROWLARR_READARR_CONFIG_XML}
      QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED: ${APP_PROWLARR_QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      QBITTORRENT_HOST: qbittorrent_server_1
      QBITTORRENT_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_INSTALLED: ${APP_PROWLARR_SABNZBD_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      SABNZBD_HOST: sabnzbd_web_1
      SABNZBD_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_API_KEY: ${APP_PROWLARR_SABNZBD_API_KEY:-""}
    volumes:
      - mac_data-config:/config
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-prowlarr_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-prowlarr_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
  mac_data-config:
    name: slashnode-prowlarr_mac_data-config
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (prowlarr). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://prowlarr.com/.
